meta.name: Jordan Ashley Barney

scorpio_5th.note: Mercury 12°17', Jupiter 2°52', Venus 18°50' — Pluto at 25°41' has crossed into 6th house (cusp: Scorpio 22°07')

sagittarius_6th.note: Sun 1°50' + N.Node 3°03' tightly conjunct (1.2°); Mars 10°46' wider (7-9° from Sun/NNode); Pluto 25°41' also in 6th via Scorpio

gemini_sagittarius.note: Primary axis; Gemini ASC (29°) + S.Node (3°) in 12th; Sag N.Node (3°) + Sun (1°50') in 6th

virgo_pisces.note: IC/MC axis Virgo-Pisces; Chiron conjunct IC (0.2°) — wound at the root, vocation at the Pisces MC

pattern_notes.pluto_in_6th: Pluto at Scorpio 25°41' is in the 6th house (cusp: Scorpio 22°07'). Transformation operates through daily work and craft. Prior data incorrectly placed Pluto in 5th.
pattern_notes.sun_nnode_conjunction: Sun (1°50') and North Node (3°03') are 1.2° apart — tight conjunction. Mars (10°46') is 7-9° from both. Soul path and identity are fused; the drive supports but is a separate instrument.
pattern_notes.chiron_conjunct_ic: Chiron (Virgo 8°29') is 0.2° past the IC (Virgo 8°17'). The wound is literally at the foundation. Transit aspects to Chiron activate root-level perfectionism/enoughness.
pattern_notes.uranus_neptune_7th: Uranus (19°35') conjunct Neptune (19°11') — 0.4° — in 7th house Capricorn. Generational conjunction made personal: disruption and dissolution are natal architecture in partnership.
pattern_notes.anaretic_ascendant: ASC at Gemini 29°22' — threshold degree. The Gemini identity question is maximally concentrated.
pattern_notes.saturn_9th_corrected: Saturn at Aquarius 24°15' — late degree 9th house. Prior data showed 1°15' (wrong by 23°). All Saturn transit timing calculations should be re-verified.
